patch_name: Combat Balance Changes — Rogue Frontier Patch 7
description: Rogue Frontier Patch 7 Combat Balance Changes (12 May 2025) — Cursed Staffs, Daggers, Frost Staffs, Shapeshifter Staffs, Armors, Miscellaneous.

sections.heading: Combat Balance Changes
sections.searchable_text: Combat Balance Changes Cursed Staffs Cursed Tar Cooldown Inner Shadow Shadowcaller plate cloth leather Daggers Throwing Blades Movement speed buff per stack Frost Staffs Frost Lance Hail Great Frost Staff slow Shapeshifter Staffs Unstable Projectile Cone splash Armors Requite Armor of Valor Miscellaneous Judgment Lightcaller line of sight Cursed Tar Explosive Bolt Crossbows Explosive Mine Weeping Repeater Fatal Blade Black Monk Stave Seedling's Bloom Rootbound Staff

subsections.heading: Cursed Staffs
subsections.searchable_text: Cursed Staffs Cursed Tar Cooldown 3s 4s Inner Shadow Shadowcaller plate area follows target leather damage vs players 33 40 cloth initial tick 0.2s 0.1s

changes.raw_text: Inner Shadow: Plate effect area now follows the target. Leather effect damage vs players: 33 → 40. Cloth effect initial tick: 0.2s → 0.1s.
notes: Plate effect area now follows the target

subsections.heading: Daggers
subsections.searchable_text: Daggers Throwing Blades Movement speed buff per stack 25% 15%

changes.raw_text: Throwing Blades: Movement speed buff per stack: 25% → 15%

subsections.heading: Frost Staffs
subsections.searchable_text: Frost Staffs Frost Lance Damage 160 148 Hail Great Frost Staff Added 10% slow 2s

subsections.heading: Shapeshifter Staffs
subsections.searchable_text: Shapeshifter Staffs Unstable Projectile Cone splash damage 40 44

subsections.heading: Armors
subsections.searchable_text: Armors Requite Armor of Valor Damage 31 27

subsections.heading: Miscellaneous
subsections.searchable_text: Miscellaneous Judgment Lightcaller visuals line of sight Cursed Tar Explosive Bolt Crossbows Explosive Mine Weeping Repeater Fatal Blade Black Monk Stave Seedling's Bloom Rootbound Staff

changes.raw_text: Judgment (Lightcaller): Visuals updated to be more readable in large-scale fights
notes: Visuals updated to be more readable in large-scale fights

changes.ability: No longer require line of sight (multiple):
changes.raw_text: These abilities no longer require line of sight: Cursed Tar (all Cursed Staffs), Explosive Bolt (all Crossbows), Explosive Mine (Weeping Repeater), Fatal Blade (Black Monk Stave), Seedling's Bloom (Rootbound Staff)
notes: Cursed Tar (all Cursed Staffs) — no longer requires line of sight
Explosive Bolt (all Crossbows) — no longer requires line of sight
Explosive Mine (Weeping Repeater) — no longer requires line of sight
Fatal Blade (Black Monk Stave) — no longer requires line of sight
Seedling's Bloom (Rootbound Staff) — no longer requires line of sight
